edit.usageInsightsHint: Share usage insights and help us improve Trang beo. You can read more about what we collect and how we use it in our <0>documentation</0>.

refund.systemPaymentDesc: One or more of your payments is a system payment. Be aware that captures and refunds are not handled by Trang beo for such payments.
